name: Bar Cheeze a La Win Shooter's
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb unsalted butter at room temperature
1 teaspoon Tabasco hot red pepper sauce
a few drops of red and yellow food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the top of a double boiler over simmering water.
2. Stir occasionally until melted and smooth.
3. If using a blender, process on high speed for two or three minutes until satiny smooth.
4. Alternatively, use an electric mixer on high speed, beating until completely smooth.
5. Pour into refrigerator-safe containers.
6. Store in the refrigerator up to four or five weeks if tightly covered.
7. Freeze for up to six months.
8. Makes about a quart.
